Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model

Class JournalEntry

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.JournalEntry
public class JournalEntry extends Object
Represents a single entry within a journal, detailing a transaction's impact on a specific account. This typically includes the date, affected account, debit or credit amount, and a memo. Lombok's @Data, @AllArgsConstructor, and @NoArgsConstructor are used for boilerplate code generation.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    JournalEntry()
    Default constructor for Jackson deserialization.
    JournalEntry(String id, String transactionId, String date, String account, BigDecimal debit, BigDecimal credit, String text)
    Constructs a JournalEntry.
    JournalEntry(String id, String date, String account, BigDecimal debit, BigDecimal credit, String text)
    Backwards compatible constructor that assumes the entry and transaction IDs are the same.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getAccount()
    Gets the account name or number associated with this journal entry.
    BigDecimal
    getCredit()
    Gets the credit amount of this journal entry.
    String
    getDate()
    Gets the date of this journal entry.
    BigDecimal
    getDebit()
    Gets the debit amount of this journal entry.
    String
    getId()
    Gets the unique identifier of this journal entry.
    String
    getMemo()
    Gets the memo or description of this journal entry.
    String
    getTransactionId()
    Gets the identifier of the transaction this entry belongs to.

  • Constructor Details

    • JournalEntry

      public JournalEntry()
      Default constructor for Jackson deserialization.

    • JournalEntry

      public JournalEntry(String id, String transactionId, String date, String account, BigDecimal debit, BigDecimal credit, String text)
      Constructs a JournalEntry.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier for this entry
      transactionId - identifier of the parent transaction
      date - the entry date in YYYY-MM-DD format
      account - the account affected by this entry
      debit - debit amount or null
      credit - credit amount or null
      text - descriptive memo text

    • JournalEntry

      public JournalEntry(String id, String date, String account, BigDecimal debit, BigDecimal credit, String text)
      Backwards compatible constructor that assumes the entry and transaction IDs are the same.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Gets the unique identifier of this journal entry.
      Returns:
      The ID of the journal entry.

    • getTransactionId

      public String getTransactionId()
      Gets the identifier of the transaction this entry belongs to.
      Returns:
      the transaction ID

    • getDate

      public String getDate()
      Gets the date of this journal entry.
      Returns:
      The date string (e.g., "YYYY-MM-DD").

    • getAccount

      public String getAccount()
      Gets the account name or number associated with this journal entry.
      Returns:
      The account identifier.

    • getDebit

      public BigDecimal getDebit()
      Gets the debit amount of this journal entry.
      Returns:
      The debit amount.

    • getCredit

      public BigDecimal getCredit()
      Gets the credit amount of this journal entry.
      Returns:
      The credit amount.

    • getMemo

      public String getMemo()
      Gets the memo or description of this journal entry.
      Returns:
      The memo text.
